intro: Samyda fragilis, also known as the brittle Samyda or the fragrant Samyda, is a species of plant in the family Salicaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Samyda fragilis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal effects.
